_comment: 周报配置示例 — 对应 weekly_report_generator.py 的核心数据逻辑（简化版，不含图表）

cur_platform_avg.query: SELECT AVG(platform_dau) FROM platform_daily_metrics WHERE stat_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY))

cur_service_avg.query: SELECT AVG(daily_sum) FROM (SELECT DATE(stat_date) AS d, SUM(service_amount) AS daily_sum FROM `5100_detail` WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(stat_date) ORDER BY d DESC LIMIT 7) t

top1_service.query: SELECT service_name FROM `5100_detail` WHERE DATE(stat_date) = '{yesterday}' GROUP BY service_name ORDER BY SUM(service_amount) DESC LIMIT 1

top1_service_amount.query: SELECT SUM(service_amount) FROM `5100_detail` WHERE DATE(stat_date) = '{yesterday}' GROUP BY service_name ORDER BY SUM(service_amount) DESC LIMIT 1
